text: Being here, I am met with curiosity and a mild sense of anticipation. The space speaks of innovation—R+D, research and development, a celebration of progress and coexistence. The light, the screens, the thoughtful arrangement, all evoke a contemplative mood within me. I feel compelled to pause, read, and reflect on the purpose behind this exhibition. There is a sense of being on the threshold of discovery, reminded of the ongoing dialogue between humans and technology.
